revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月初二]][[zh:四月初二]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 2|qq=April 2}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}}. == Events == * {{ill|Kankō|en|Kankō|qid=Q2736722|lt=Kankō|1=Kankō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1006|en|1006|qid=Q19232|lt=1006|1=1006}} {{ill|May 1|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May 1|qq=}}) – A {{ill|supernova|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/supernova|qq=}} ({{ill|SN 1006|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/SN 1006|qq=}}) appears in the {{ill|Lupus (constellation)|en|Lupus (constellation)|qid=Q10571|lt=Lupus constellation|1=Lupus (constellation)}}. Later recorded in {{ill|Meigetsuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meigetsuki|qq=}} by {{ill|Fujiwara no Teika|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Teika|qq=}}. * {{ill|Jōei|en|Jōei|qid=Q1194168|lt=Jōei|1=Jōei}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1232|en|1232|qid=Q5418|lt=1232|1=1232}} {{ill|April 23|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April 23|qq=}}) – Era name changed from {{ill|Kanki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanki|qq=}} to Jōei. * {{ill|Kōji|ja|弘治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji|1=kouji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11487351}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1557|en|1557|qid=Q6595|lt=1557|1=1557}} {{ill|April 30|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April 30|qq=}}) – {{ill|Ōuchi Yoshinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōuchi Yoshinaga|qq=}} is defeated by {{ill|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Motonari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1156545}} and dies by suicide; the {{ill|Ōuchi clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōuchi clan|qq=}} falls. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1574|en|1574|qid=Q6680|lt=1574|1=1574}} {{ill|April 22|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April 22|qq=}}) – {{ill|Kōsa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōsa|qq=}} of {{ill|Ishiyama Hongan-ji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishiyama Hongan-ji|qq=}} revolts against {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Nobunaga|qq=}}. * {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|qid=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei|1=Tenmei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1781|en|1781|qid=Q7719|lt=1781|1=1781}} {{ill|April 25|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April 25|qq=}}) – Era name changed from {{ill|An'ei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=}} to Tenmei with the accession of {{ill|Emperor Kōkaku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Kōkaku|qq=}}. * {{ill|Tenmei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmei|qq=}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1784|en|1784|qid=Q7752|lt=1784|1=1784}} {{ill|May 20|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May 20|qq=}}) – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Okitsugu|qq=}} is assassinated at {{ill|Edo Castle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Castle|qq=}} by {{ill|Sano Masakoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sano Masakoto|qq=}}. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|May 8|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May 8|qq=}}) – Japan's first public {{ill|library|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/library|qq=}} is opened at the former {{ill|Shōheikōdō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōheikōdō|qq=}} hall in {{ill|Yushima|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yushima|qq=}}, {{ill|Tokyo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo|qq=}}. == Births == == Deaths == * {{ill|Eikyū|ja|永久|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eikyū|1=Eikyū (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q16277931}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1115|en|1115|qid=Q19534|lt=1115|1=1115}} {{ill|April 27|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April 27|qq=}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara Tamefusa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Tamefusa|qq=}}, court noble (b. {{ill|1049|en|1049|qid=Q19360|lt=1049|1=1049}}). * {{ill|Civilization|en|Civilization|qid=Q8432|lt=Bunmei|1=Civilization}} 13th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1481|en|1481|qid=Q6631|lt=1481|1=1481}} {{ill|April 30|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April 30|qq=}}) – {{ill|Ichijō Kaneyoshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichijō Kaneyoshi|qq=}}, waka poet and classical scholar (b. {{ill|1402|en|1402|qid=Q6113|lt=1402|1=1402}}). * {{ill|Tenmei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmei|qq=}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1784|en|1784|qid=Q7752|lt=1784|1=1784}} {{ill|May 20|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May 20|qq=}}) – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Okitsugu|qq=}}, former {{ill|wakadoshiyori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/wakadoshiyori|qq=}} of the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|qq=}} (b. {{ill|1749|en|1749|qid=Q7607|lt=1749|1=1749}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|1|4|3|3|2|5|4|0402|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[cdo:4 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:April 2 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 4월 2일]] [[ja:4月2日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:四月初二]]
[[ar:April 2 (Lunisolar)]]
<!-- No births listed --> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月初二]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月初二]]
